nasb.text: But the fig tree said to them, ‘Shall I leave my sweetness and my good fruit, and go to wave over the trees?’

esv.text: But the fig tree said to them, ‘Shall I leave my sweetness and my good fruit and go hold sway over the trees?’

cnv.text: 無花果樹對它們說：‘我怎可以放棄結出我的甜美果子，飄搖在眾樹之上呢？’

ccb.text: 无花果树说，‘我怎能因为贪图凌驾于众树之上而停止出产甜美的果子呢？’
